name: conversations_create
description: Start a new omnichannel conversation by sending the first message to a contact via the Conversations API.

parameters.name: channelId
parameters.description: The channel ID to use for sending.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Message content object. For text: {"text": "message"}. For media: {"url": "...", "caption": "..."}. For HSM: template parameters.

content.text: Hello! How can we help you today?
